_primary_source: Lenstra, Lenstra, Lovasz (1982) DOI:10.1007/BF01457454; Hoffstein, Pipher, Silverman (1998) DOI:10.1007/BFb0054868
description: Worked N=7 q=16 example: the standard 2N-dim NTRU attack lattice [I_N|H; 0|q*I_N] genuinely contains the private key (f,g) as a lattice vector -- verified algebraically (f convolved with h equals g mod q), the structural precondition the empirical fpylll LLL/BKZ record depends on
